title: Stable Consumer API, CLI, and Compatibility Contract
objective: Expose a stable product-neutral Enki service boundary through versioned APIs and CLI operations without allowing consumers to bypass governance or access repositories directly.
exit_criteria: Versioned request, response, error, receipt, pagination, and idempotency contracts are explicit
CLI and API exercise the same application services and authority checks
Unsupported, ambiguous, or incompatible versions fail closed
Consumers cannot write canonical records or consume approvals through repository shortcuts
Generated contract documentation and compatibility fixtures remain deterministic

evidence.description: Implemented the stable v1.0 consumer contract, shared governed API and CLI gateway, idempotency, pagination, compatibility fixtures, deterministic documentation, and bypass denial.
Merged the complete Sprint 21 implementation into sandbox.
CI passed the complete stable consumer contract and regression suite.
Runtime Coverage passed the declared Sprint 21 consumer path matrix.
Work Control Authority passed on the synchronized implementation head.
State Authority passed for the implementation.
Canonicalization Security passed after deterministic generated-audit synchronization.
Publication 000001 asset regression checks remained green.
